name: Isothipendyl
description: Isothipendyl is an antihistamine and anticholinergic used as an antipruritic.
indication: For the topical treatment of itching associated with allergic reactions.
mechanismOfAction: Isothipendyl is a selective histamine H1 antagonist and binds to the histamine H1 receptor. This blocks the action of endogenous histamine, which subsequently leads to temporary relief of the negative symptoms brought on by histamine.
pharmacodynamics: Isothipendyl, an azaphenothiazine derivative, competitively binds to histamine (H1) receptors, resulting in inhibition of the pharmacological effects of histamines. It also has some sedative, anticholinergic and antiserotoninergic effects.

interactions.name: Benzylpenicilloyl Polylysine
interactions.description: Isothipendyl may decrease effectiveness of Benzylpenicilloyl Polylysine as a diagnostic agent.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Hyaluronidase can be decreased when used in combination with Isothipendyl.

interactions.name: Betahistine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Betahistine can be decreased when used in combination with Isothipendyl.

interactions.name: Pseudoephedrine
interactions.description: Pseudoephedrine may decrease the sedative activities of Isothipendyl.

interactions.name: Diethylpropion
interactions.description: Diethylpropion may decrease the sedative activities of Isothipendyl.
